info.title: House Prices in Poland
info.subtitle: Do EDA and Create Model that Predict the price of apartments.
info.description:
### Context The data has been pre-cleaned but still needs to be take care of. The data come from one of the websites, where we can find advertisements of the sale of apartments. The data is from February 2021. ### Content Description:
  • address - Full addres
  • city - Warszawa (Warsaw), Kraków (Cracow), Poznań (Poznan).
  • floor - The number of the floor where the apartment is located
  • id - id
  • latitude - latitude
  • longitude - longitude
  • price - Price of apartment in PLN [TARGET]
  • rooms - Number of rooms in the apartment
  • sq - Number of square meters of the apartment
  • year - Year of the building / apartment
